updates.title: ‘Wealth isn’t built from leftovers’: CA explains why ₹1.2 lakh monthly salary may still leave you with no savings
updates.summary: A LinkedIn post by a CA discusses how high income does not guarantee wealth, citing lifestyle inflation as a key issue. Many earners struggle to save due to rising expenses, emphasising the need for better financial planning. Details here.&nbsp;
updates.user_impact: May impact your loan EMIs, FD returns, or savings rates
updates.content_angle: Educational explainer on this rates & monetary policy development

updates.title: PPF investment strategy: How account holders can maximize their returns in the long term? Experts weigh in
updates.summary: The PPF is a popular long-term savings option offering safety, steady returns, and tax benefits. With a current deposit rate of 7.10%, strategies like timing contributions and using spouse accounts can maximize returns, according to experts.
updates.user_impact: May impact your FD, PPF, or small savings returns
updates.content_angle: Educational explainer on this deposits & savings development

updates.title: I asked ChatGPT what ₹1 crore in my savings account will be worth after 20 years—the answer was baffling…
updates.summary: At 6% inflation,  ₹1 crore will lose significant purchasing power over 20 years, equating to roughly  ₹31 lakh today. Investing wisely can help maintain value, as leaving money idle in savings accounts risks financial stability due to inflation's impact on real income.
updates.user_impact: May impact your loan EMIs, FD returns, or savings rates
updates.content_angle: Educational explainer on this rates & monetary policy development

updates.title: Why most SIP investors fail midway — And how the 7-5-3-1 rule can help you create real wealth
updates.summary: The main challenge in mutual fund SIPs is staying invested long enough to benefit from compounding. The 7-5-3-1 rule emphasises patience, diversification, and emotional discipline to build long-term wealth, showing that staying invested for at least 7 years significantly increases portfolio value.
updates.user_impact: May affect your mutual fund investments or SIPs
updates.content_angle: Educational explainer on this mutual funds development

updates.title: What are arbitrage funds? How they work, who should invest, and other details
updates.summary: Arbitrage Funds are low-risk hybrid mutual funds that profit from price differences between cash and futures markets. While minimising risks, these funds are not entirely risk-free and may underperform in bearish markets. Here's all you need to know.

updates.title: Mutual Fund SIP: Why is making the first crore the hardest thing to do?
updates.summary: The toughest part of building a  ₹10 crore retirement fund is reaching the first  ₹1 crore, which may take 14 years. However, with compounding and consistent SIP investments, subsequent crores can be accumulated significantly faster
